personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A premium, student-focused super app that balances clean, light utilitarian content surfaces with luxurious navy-to-tosca glassmorphic brand moments.

spacing.rule: Use 8pt grid system. Generous padding around content. Forms and lists should breathe. Stick primary actions to the bottom with safe area padding.

do's: Use premium frosted glass for Splash screen Login/Signup pill buttons (~28px radius) over the gradient.
Apply glassmorphism to bottom sheet modals (drag handle, header, translucent panel with scrim).
Use glass effect on sticky bottom CTAs (e.g., Cart checkout button over scrolling food list).
Ensure text on glass is fully readable by adding a subtle white or dark tint layer beneath the blur.
dont's: Do not use glass for text-heavy content areas or standard list rows.
Do not over-layer glass on top of glass; keep it to one elevation tier (e.g., just the bottom sheet).

screens.name: Splash
screens.purpose: First impression and auth entry point.

states.loading: Centered white stylized N logo spinning subtly.

screens.layout: Full bleed vertical gradient (`brandGradientStart` to `brandGradientEnd`). Centered white logo and 'NEARIFY' wordmark + 'Tempatnya Mahasiswa'. Bottom area: Glassy translucent pill CTAs ('Login', 'Sign up') with soft shadow and ~28px radius. Version text at very bottom.

screens.name: Home (Dashboard)
screens.purpose: Central hub for navigating the 5 super-app services.

states.error: Error loading dashboard data + Retry button.

screens.layout: Top: Greeting and contextual info. Middle: A premium gradient featured card (promos/wallet). Core: 4-item service grid (Food, Laundry, Kost, Quran) as clear tappable cards with `brandTertiary` icon backgrounds. Bottom: 4-tab bar (Home, Pesanan, Al-Quran, Profil).

screens.name: Food Delivery
screens.purpose: Browse warungs, view menus, and add to cart.
screens.layout: Clean `surfaceSecondary` background. Search bar at top. Horizontal scroll for categories. Vertical list of restaurant cards with large, high-quality images. Sticky glass CTA at bottom when cart has items.

screens.name: Kost Discovery
screens.purpose: Find boarding houses via list or map.
screens.layout: Toggle between Map and List view. High-quality image carousels per kost card. Bottom sheet modal (glassmorphic) for advanced filtering.

screens.name: Laundry
screens.purpose: Utility flows for scheduling pickup and delivery.
screens.layout: Forms with single-column layouts for service selection, quantity, and scheduling.

screens.name: Al-Quran Digital
screens.purpose: Read surahs with Arabic and Indonesian translation.
screens.layout: Clean, distraction-free reading surface. Generous vertical rhythm. Arabic text larger and right-aligned, Indonesian translation smaller below it.

splash_bg_fallback.alt: University students on campus, blurred background for splash if needed

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the primary navy-to-tosca gradient (#0B1B3D -> #05626A -> #00A896) on the Splash screen, main app headers, and key promotional cards. Do NOT use it for text-heavy backgrounds.
Implement the 'premium glassmorphism' specifically on the Splash screen CTAs (using expo-blur with a semi-transparent white fill and ~28px radius) and bottom sheets (e.g., Kost filters).
Enforce a strict 4-tab maximum for bottom navigation: Home, Pesanan, Al-Quran, and Profil. Do not add a 5th tab.

Maintain high contrast on content screens (Food, Kost) by utilizing the light surfaces (#F8FAFC and #FFFFFF) with Tosca (#00A896) accents. Ensure text is NEVER rendered directly on images without a top-down gradient scrim.
Cap typography weights at 500 across all screens. Hierarchy should be established via size (using Plus Jakarta Sans), not heavy bolding.
For the Al-Quran feature, ensure the layout supports a distraction-free, generous vertical rhythm with Arabic aligned right and Indonesian translation below it.
Never use generic Emojis in the UI. Rely on the specified Phosphor icon set for system and utility icons.
Build the home screen as a 'dashboard'. Use a top greeting, a premium promo/wallet card, and a clear 4-item grid for the main services (Food, Laundry, Kost, Quran). Keep touch targets large.
